<!-- Title: use imperative, short and conventional commit style: feat(scope): short description -->

## Description

Describe the change and why it is needed. Link to related issue if applicable.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (`fix`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs`)
- [ ] CI / build (`ci`)
- [ ] Chore / refactor (`chore` / `refactor`)

## How has this been tested?
Describe the test steps or automated tests you ran. Include commands and expected results.

## Checklist
- [ ] Branch rebased on `develop` and up-to-date
- [ ] CI is green
- [ ] At least one reviewer assigned
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] Changes are small and focused where possible

## Notes for reviewers
Anything specific you want reviewers to pay attention to, known limitations, or follow-up tasks.
